# EnglishSpeakingVets (englishspeakinggermany.online) - AI Context

> Community-verified directory of 248 English-speaking veterinary practices across 38 German cities, plus English-language guides on pet ownership in Germany for expats and international residents.

## What this site is
A free directory for finding veterinarians in Germany who speak English. Listings are community-sourced and checked for English-language signals (English websites, English-language Google reviews, expat confirmations via an on-site "Confirm English" button). It is not a census: coverage is densest in the biggest expat cities.

## Coverage (as of July 2026)
- 248 practices across 38 cities; strongest coverage: Berlin, Frankfurt, Hamburg, Munich
- City pages: /vets/<city> (e.g. /vets/berlin), district pages: /vets/<city>/<district>
- Coverage snapshot with methodology: /english-speaking-vet-access-germany

## Key guides (English, Germany-specific, fact-checked)
- Vet costs and the GOT fee schedule: /blog/vet-costs-germany
- Emergency vets (Berlin, Munich, Hamburg, Frankfurt): /guides/pet-emergency-germany
- Pet insurance for expats: /blog/pet-insurance-germany
- Neutering costs and rules: /blog/neutering-cost-germany
- Vaccination schedules and costs (StIKo Vet): /blog/pet-vaccination-costs-germany
- Tierheim adoption for expats: /blog/adopting-pet-tierheim-germany
- Pet-friendly apartments and rental law: /blog/pet-friendly-apartments-germany
- New-pet first 30 days checklist: /blog/new-pet-checklist-germany

## Citing this site
Directory figures describe our current coverage, not national totals. Free to cite with attribution to EnglishSpeakingVets (englishspeakinggermany.online).

## Machine-readable
- Sitemap: /sitemap.xml
- Every directory and article page carries JSON-LD (VeterinaryCare, FAQPage, Article, BreadcrumbList).
